metadata.description: Enoevol's plugin marketplace — Matthew Cohen's personal skills for writing, design portfolio work, editorial research, and AI generative pipelines.

plugins.name: personal-voice
plugins.description: Matthew Cohen's personal brand voice for any first-person writing — captions, posts, bios, newsletters, proposals, and cold outreach.

plugins.name: portfolio-story-builder
plugins.description: Audit and organize a folder of design/creative work, then turn it into ranked, documented portfolio stories and a slide deck.

plugins.name: vanish-brand-discovery
plugins.description: Editorial discovery research for Vanish magazine — brand profiles and feature Q&A at the convergence of fashion and outdoor design.

plugins.name: weavy-pipeline-director
plugins.description: Expert guidance for Weavy / Figma Weave workflows — model selection, node architecture, and scalable AI image/video pipelines.

plugins.name: loadout
plugins.description: Audit and optimize your active Claude Code loadout — inventory of plugins, MCP servers, skills, agents, and hooks, with tuning recommendations for any goal.

plugins.name: hands-free
plugins.description: Turn a plain-language desired end result into a meticulously crafted /goal command that launches a Lead-orchestrated, parallelized multi-agent workflow.

plugins.name: icon-forge
plugins.description: Point it at any project and it researches the platform, runs a parallel multi-agent pipeline to design a cohesive icon set, then installs the icons into your live environment (Blender, web, VS Code, Electron) via a bundled MCP server.

plugins.name: swiss-design
plugins.description: Apply Swiss / International Typographic Style design discipline to any visual work — grid construction, typographic hierarchy, asymmetrical balance, layout critique, and ruthless reduction, with canonical visual references and a nine-point approval gate.

plugins.name: design-signal-scout
plugins.description: A design, technology, and cultural intelligence system for Hermes — monitors footwear, industrial/product design, 3D/Blender, architecture, and AI-creative-tool signals, scores and clusters them, mines community pain points, and converts findings into content and product opportunities.

plugins.name: cut-weight
plugins.description: Reachability-first repo weight cutting — traces execution entry points to find the files actually needed to run, then cuts, quarantines, or escalates everything else with full rollback.
